text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 287 

VET_IND 

LABEL: Veteran Indicator — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating if the beneficiary is a non-citizen who is exempt from the five-year bar on benefits 
because they are a veteran or an active member of the military, naval, or air service; most recent in 
the calendar and the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: VET_IND 

LONG NAME: VET_IND 

TYPE:
